title: tilia henryana var. henryana
intro: Tilia henryana var. henryana, also known as the Henry's Lime Tree, is a deciduous tree species within the Tilia genus, native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its flowers and leaves, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tilia henryana var. henryana include reducing anxiety and stress, soothing respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Traditionally, the flowers and leaves are prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been used in herbal medicine for centuries to treat various ailments.
